channel.title: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) U.S. Civilian Government — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) U.S. Civilian Government (cisa-cg).

image.title: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) U.S. Civilian Government — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-63397 · 7.1 HIGH — remorses/genql code injection
item.description: remorses/genql before version 6.3.4 allows an authenticated attacker with control of the GraphQL schema that is passed to genql to inject arbitrary JavaScript or TypeScript. The malicious code is injected into the generated schema.ts file and execute…

item.title: CVE-2026-57476 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ ☁️ — Deloitte AI Assist for Customer unauthenticated RAG corpus read and write
item.description: Deloitte AI Assist for Customer exposed unauthenticated API endpoints that allowed an attacker with knowledge of additional parameters to read from or inject content into the retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) corpus. On 2026-03-25, AI Assist for C…

item.title: CVE-2026-57475 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ ☁️ — Deloitte AI Assist for Customer unauthenticated configuration write
item.description: Deloitte AI Assist for Customer accepted unauthenticated POST requests through public-facing API endpoints that allowed a remote attacker to make limited additions to the configuration. These additions were not used by the system. On 2026-03-25, AI A…

item.title: CVE-2026-57474 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ ☁️ — Deloitte AI Assist for Customer information disclosure
item.description: Deloitte AI Assist for Customer disclosed some configuration information through public-facing API endpoints that accepted unauthenticated requests. This information could reduce an attacker’s reconnaissance effort. On 2026-03-25, AI Assist for Custo…

item.title: CVE-2026-61344 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Superior Court of California Hearing Reminder Service unauthenticated information disclosure
item.description: The Superior Court of California Hearing Reminder Service at https://www.hrs.courts.ca.gov exposes an API endpoint that returns court reminder records containing potentially sensitive information without authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-61343 · 8.6 HIGH — LibreBooking path traversal
item.description: LibreBooking's email template editor save action passes the submitted template name directly into the destination file path, allowing a remote attacker with administrator credentials to write an arbitrary file outside the template directory and execu…

item.title: CVE-2026-58378 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Allwinner TV Box TV98 ADB exposed on network
item.description: Allwinner H616 TV Box TV98 has ADB enabled and exposed to the network on production. An attacker could request for ADB authorization and gain root level privileges if the victim allows access.

item.title: CVE-2026-58583 · 8.4 HIGH — FluxInk Color Management Driver local privilege escalation
item.description: FluxInk (formerly Sunia SPB Peripheral) Color Management Driver (TcnPeripheral64.sys) 1.0.7.2 allows local privilege escalation for a standard user account via arbitrary physical memory mapping at \Device\PhysicalMemory. Fixed in version 1.0.7.6. The…

item.title: CVE-2026-56876 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ 👻 — extract-zip unvalidated symlink path traversal
item.description: extract-zip does not validate symlink targets when extracting zip archives. When processing a malicious zip file containing a symlink with a relative path like '../../../../etc/passwd', extract-zip will extract the symlink without validation, allowin…

item.title: CVE-2026-54106 · 5.1 MEDIUM ☁️ — U.S. GAO EPDS and CBCA EDS network access control bypass
item.description: The U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) Electronic Protest Docketing System (EPDS) and Civilian Board of Contract Appeals (CBCA) Electronic Docketing System (EDS) do not validate X-Forwarded-For HTTP headers, allowing a remote attacker with c…

item.title: CVE-2026-54105 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ ☁️ — U.S. GAO EPDS and CBCA EDS user information disclosure
item.description: The U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) Electronic Protest Docketing System (EPDS) and Civilian Board of Contract Appeals (CBCA) Electronic Docketing System (EDS) expose sensitive account information through the 'update-profile/' API endpoint…

item.title: CVE-2026-54104 · 8.8 HIGH ☁️ — U.S. GAO EPDS and CBCA EDS client-based privilege escalation
item.description: The U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) Electronic Protest Docketing System (EPDS) and Civilian Board of Contract Appeals (CBCA) Electronic Docketing System (EDS) trusts client-provided values for the 'epds_role_id' parameter without verifica…

item.title: CVE-2026-54103 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ ☁️ — U.S. GAO EPDS and CBCA EDS unauthenticated password change
item.description: The U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) Electronic Protest Docketing System (EPDS) and Civilian Board of Contract Appeals (CBCA) Electronic Docketing System (EDS) does not authenticate password change requests to the '/update-profile/N' API e…

item.title: CVE-2026-56020 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Webmin HTTP header authentication bypass
item.description: The Webmin HTTP server (miniserv.pl) allows unauthenticated attackers to impersonate any user with a configured SSL client certificate by sending a forged HTTP header. A remote attacker can spoof certificate DNs and authenticate as any user. Fixed in…

item.title: CVE-2026-56021 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Webmin information disclosure via regex pattern
item.description: Webmin allows unauthenticated attackers to read the contents of any file ending in .conf within module directories, due to a bypassable regex pattern.

item.title: CVE-2026-56022 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Webmin MFA bypass
item.description: Webmin accepts basic authentication without session cookies when an attacker provides the 'User-Agent: webmin' header, allowing bypass of additional MFA requirements. Fixed in 2.641.

item.title: CVE-2025-71316 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQLite sqldiff remote code execution via argument injection
item.description: SQLite 'sqldiff.exe' does not securely handle the way the Microsoft Windows C runtime converts Unicode characters to ANSI codepages. An attacker could use the '-L' option to load an arbitrary DLL with a crafted command line argument string that resul…

item.title: CVE-2026-49433 · 5 MEDIUM 🌩️ ☁️ — DeepAI api.deepai.org/change_user_email CSRF
item.description: The DeepAI endpoint 'https://api.deepai.org/change_user_email' accepts POST requests without any CSRF protection. If an attacker can trick a logged-in user into clicking a malicious link, the attacker can change the user's email address and take over…

item.title: CVE-2026-45557 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Technitium DNS Server excessive DNSSEC requests
item.description: Technitium DNS Server aggressively tries to fetch missing RRSIG records or mismatched DNSKEY records. An attacker in control of a domain can cause a vulnerable system to generate excessive network traffic. Fixed in 15.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-44159 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — Tyler Identity Local (TID-L) default administrative credentials
item.description: Tyler Identity Local (TID-L) uses documented, default administrative credentials. Users are not required to change the credentials before deployment. TID-L has not been distributed since December 2020, and has not been supported since 2021.

item.title: CVE-2026-43510 · 7.6 HIGH — CISA manage.get.gov insecure portfolio administrative privileges
item.description: manage.get.gov is the .gov TLD registrar maintained by CISA. manage.get.gov allows an organization administrator to assign domain manager privileges for domains not already in another organization. Fixed in 1.176.0 on or around 2026-04-30.

item.title: CVE-2025-51846 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — CryptPad unbounded WebSocket frame flood
item.description: CryptPad 2025.3.1 allows unbounded WebSocket frame flood. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can significantly degrade or deny service for all users of a CryptPad instance. Fixed in 2026.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-35383 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Bentley Systems iTwin Platform exposed access token
item.description: Bentley Systems iTwin Platform exposed a Cesium ion access token in the source of some web pages. An unauthenticated attacker could use this token to enumerate or delete certain assets. As of 2026-03-27, the token is no longer present in the web page…

item.title: CVE-2026-33268 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Nanoleaf Lines unauthenticated firmware file store
item.description: Nanoleaf Lines 12.3.2 does not authenticate firmware file uploads. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can upload firmware files on the device and consume storage resources. Fixed in 12.3.6.

item.title: CVE-2025-60949 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Census CSWeb leaked configuration files
item.description: Census CSWeb 8.0.1 allows "app/config" to be reachable via HTTP in some deployments. A remote, unauthenticated attacker could send requests to configuration files and obtain leaked secrets. Fixed in 8.1.0 alpha.

item.title: CVE-2025-60948 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Census CSWeb stored XSS
item.description: Census CSWeb 8.0.1 allows stored cross-site scripting in user supplied fields. A remote, authenticated attacker could store malicious javascript that executes in a victim's browser. Fixed in 8.1.0 alpha.

item.title: CVE-2025-60947 · 8.8 HIGH — Census CSWeb arbitrary file upload
item.description: Census CSWeb 8.0.1 allows arbitrary file upload. A remote, authenticated attacker could upload a malicious file, possibly leading to remote code execution. Fixed in 8.1.0 alpha.

item.title: CVE-2025-60946 · 8.8 HIGH — Census CSWeb path traversal
item.description: Census CSWeb 8.0.1 allows arbitrary file path input. A remote, authenticated attacker could access unintended file directories. Fixed in 8.1.0 alpha.

item.title: CVE-2026-32869 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE XSS via Name of Organization field
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE before 10.2.0.0 do not correctly sanitize the contents of the "Name of Organization" field when filling out case information. An authenticated attacker can inject an XSS payload which is executed in the context of a victim…

item.title: CVE-2026-32868 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE XSS via my information
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE before 10.2.0.0 do not correctly sanitize the contents of first and last name fields in the 'My Information' screen. An authenticated attacker can inject parts of an XSS payload in the first and last name fields. The paylo…

item.title: CVE-2026-32867 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — OPEXUS eComplaint unauthenticated file upload
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint before version 10.1.0.0 allows an unauthenticated attacker to obtain or guess an existing case number and upload arbitrary files via 'Portal/EEOC/DocumentUploadPub.aspx'. Users would see these unexpected files in cases. Uploading a…

item.title: CVE-2026-32866 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eComplaint and eCase stored XSS via profile first and last name
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE before 10.2.0.0 do not correctly sanitize the contents of first and last name fields in a user profile. An authenticated attacker can inject parts of an XSS payload in their first and last name fields. The payload is execu…

item.title: CVE-2026-32865 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OPEXUS eComplaint and eCase insecure password reset
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint and eCASE before version 10.1.0.0 include the secret verification code in the HTTP response when requesting a password reset via 'ForcePasswordReset.aspx'. An attacker who knows an existing user's email address can reset the user's…

item.title: CVE-2026-32298 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Angeet ES3 KVM OS command injection
item.description: The Angeet ES3 KVM does not properly sanitize user-supplied variables parsed by the 'cfg.lua' script, allowing an authenticated attacker to execute OS-level commands.

item.title: CVE-2026-32297 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Angeet ES3 KVM unauthenticated arbitrary file write
item.description: The Angeet ES3 KVM allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to write arbitrary files, including configuration files or system binaries. Modified configuration files or system binaries could allow an attacker to take complete control of a vulnerable…

item.title: CVE-2026-32296 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Sipeed NanoKVM unauthenticated Wi-Fi configuration endpoint
item.description: Sipeed NanoKVM before 2.3.1 exposes a Wi-Fi configuration endpoint without proper security checks, allowing an unauthenticated attacker with network access to change the saved configured Wi-Fi network to one of the attacker's choosing, or craft a req…

item.title: CVE-2026-32295 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — JetKVM insufficient login rate limiting
item.description: JetKVM before 0.5.4 does not rate limit login requests, enabling brute-force attempts to guess credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-32294 · 7 HIGH — JetKVM insufficient firmware verification
item.description: JetKVM prior to 0.5.4 does not verify the authenticity of downloaded firmware files. An attacker-in-the-middle or a compromised update server could modify the firmware and the corresponding SHA256 hash to pass verification.

item.title: CVE-2026-32293 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM insufficient certificate validation
item.description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM connects to a GL-iNet site during boot-up to provision client and CA certificates. The GL-RM1 does not verify certificates used for this connection, allowing an attacker-in-the-middle to serve invalid client and CA cert…

item.title: CVE-2026-32292 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM insufficient login rate-limiting
item.description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM web interface does not limit login requests, enabling brute-force attempts to guess credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-32291 · 7 HIGH — GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM unauthenticated root access via UART serial console
item.description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM before 1.8.2 does not require authentication on the UART serial console. This attack requires physically opening the device and connecting to the UART pins.

item.title: CVE-2026-32290 · 7 HIGH — GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM insufficient firmware verification
item.description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM before version 1.8.2 does not sufficiently verify the authenticity of uploaded firmware files. An attacker-in-the-middle or a compromised update server could modify the firmware and the corresponding MD5 hash to pass ve…

item.title: CVE-2025-62193 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — NOAA PMEL Live Access Server (LAS) PyFerret command injection
item.description: Sites running NOAA PMEL Live Access Server (LAS) are vulnerable to remote code execution via specially crafted requests that include PyFerret expressions. By leveraging a SPAWN command, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary OS comm…

item.title: CVE-2025-68947 · 5.7 MEDIUM — NSecsoft NSecKrnl process termination privilege escalation
item.description: NSecsoft 'NSecKrnl' is a Windows driver that allows a local, authenticated attacker to terminate processes owned by other users, including SYSTEM and Protected Processes by issuing crafted IOCTL requests to the driver.

item.title: CVE-2026-22235 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — OPEXUS eComplaint IDOR
item.description: OPEXUS eComplaint before version 9.0.45.0 allows an attacker to visit the the 'DocumentOpen.aspx' endpoint, iterate through predictable values of 'chargeNumber', and download any uploaded files.

item.title: CVE-2026-22234 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OPEXUS eCasePortal unauthenticated IDOR
item.description: OPEXUS eCasePortal before version 9.0.45.0 allows an unauthenticated attacker to navigate to the 'Attachments.aspx' endpoint, iterate through predictable values of 'formid', and download or delete all user-uploaded files, or upload new files.

item.title: CVE-2026-22233 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eCASE Audit Project Cost stored XSS
item.description: OPEXUS eCASE Audit allows an authenticated attacker to save JavaScript as a comment in the "Estimated Staff Hours" field. The JavaScript is executed whenever another user visits the Project Cost tab. Fixed in OPEXUS eCASE Audit 11.14.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-22232 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eCASE Audit Project Setup stored XSS
item.description: OPEXUS eCASE Audit allows an authenticated attacker to save JavaScript in the "A or SIC Number" field within the Project Setup functionality. The JavaScript is executed whenever another user views the project. Fixed in OPEXUS eCASE Audit 11.14.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-22231 · 5.5 MEDIUM — OPEXUS eCASE Audit Document Check Out stored XSS
item.description: OPEXUS eCASE Audit allows an authenticated attacker to save JavaScript as a comment within the Document Check Out functionality. The JavaScript is executed whenever another user views the Action History Log. Fixed in OPEXUS eCASE Platform 11.14.1.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-22230 · 7.6 HIGH — OPEXUS eCASE Audit incorrect access control
item.description: OPEXUS eCASE Audit allows an authenticated attacker to modify client-side JavaScript or craft HTTP requests to access functions or buttons that have been disabled or blocked by an administrator. Fixed in eCASE Platform 11.14.1.0.
